message:
refactor(tui): improve scrollable panel stability and dashboard panel resilience

ScrollablePanel improvements:
- Add content change detection to avoid unnecessary viewport resets
- Preserve scroll position when resizing viewport dimensions
- Remove unused 'ready' field and simplify initialization
- Use lastContent tracking for efficient SetContent no-ops

Dashboard panel updates:
- Alerts, Beads, CASS, Files panels: improve content rendering
- Add comprehensive test coverage for panel edge cases
- Dashboard layout test coverage improvements

Build and all tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
